metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the bike-mobility domain.

children.name: Employer Policy & Program Management
children.description: Configures employer-level mobility programs including subsidy logic, plan design, market variations, approval rules, and policy governance.

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Employer Policy & Program Management.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Employer Policy & Program Management.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls
internalModules.description: Supports testing, exceptions, and operator overrides for Employer Policy & Program Management.

interfaces.title: Decision API
interfaces.description: API that returns policy, quote, or eligibility outcomes calculated by Employer Policy & Program Management.

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Employer Policy & Program Management.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Employer Policy & Program Management.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Order Orchestration & Checkout to provide operations capabilities required by Employer Policy & Program Management.
Depends on Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring to provide analytics capabilities required by Employer Policy & Program Management.
Depends on Contract Lifecycle Management to provide service capabilities required by Employer Policy & Program Management.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Employer Policy & Program Management synchronizes rules, policies, or decision parameters with external policy systems.
Employer Policy & Program Management may call regulatory or compliance services to validate decisions and exceptions.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Execution flows depend on Employer Policy & Program Management to evaluate rules, policies, eligibility, or pricing outcomes.
Governance and admin tooling depend on Employer Policy & Program Management to maintain controlled rule and policy changes.

children.name: Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator
children.description: Calculates rider and employer cost scenarios, subsidy rules, and savings projections before enrollment or policy changes.

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls
internalModules.description: Supports testing, exceptions, and operator overrides for Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

interfaces.title: Decision API
interfaces.description: API that returns policy, quote, or eligibility outcomes calculated by Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Order Orchestration & Checkout to provide operations capabilities required by Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.
Depends on Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring to provide analytics capabilities required by Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.
Depends on Contract Lifecycle Management to provide service capabilities required by Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator synchronizes rules, policies, or decision parameters with external policy systems.
Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator may call regulatory or compliance services to validate decisions and exceptions.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Execution flows depend on Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator to evaluate rules, policies, eligibility, or pricing outcomes.
Governance and admin tooling depend on Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator to maintain controlled rule and policy changes.

children.name: Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync
children.description: Synchronizes employee eligibility, payroll deductions, employment events, and employer master data with HR and payroll systems.

internalModules.title: Contract and Mapping Layer
internalModules.description: Maintains schemas, field mappings, and versioned contracts used by Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

internalModules.title: Transformation and Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Transforms messages and routes requests or events through Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

internalModules.title: Access and Observability Controls
internalModules.description: Applies authentication, throttling, retry handling, and monitoring for Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

interfaces.title: Inbound API
interfaces.description: API entry point used to submit requests or payloads into Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

interfaces.title: Outbound Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event or webhook surface used by Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync to publish downstream updates.

interfaces.title: Partner Connector Surface
interfaces.description: Connector interface for external systems exchanging data through Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience to provide identity capabilities required by Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.
Depends on Order Orchestration & Checkout to provide operations capabilities required by Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.
Depends on Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring to provide analytics capabilities required by Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync exchanges operational data with external partner platforms and adjacent systems.
Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync depends on messaging infrastructure to route and buffer integration traffic.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Internal services depend on Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync to connect reliably with partner systems and adjacent platforms.
Partner-facing workflows depend on Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync to exchange data and synchronize state with external parties.

children.name: Bike Catalog & Recommendation
children.description: Presents bike, accessory, and package choices with recommendation logic based on commute profile, employer policy, and local availability.

internalModules.title: Catalog and Index Pipeline
internalModules.description: Builds and refreshes the searchable corpus, facets, and metadata used by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

internalModules.title: Ranking and Recommendation Engine
internalModules.description: Ranks results or recommendations surfaced by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

internalModules.title: Merchandising and Tuning Controls
internalModules.description: Lets operators tune relevance, boosts, and presentation behavior in Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

interfaces.title: Search and Query API
interfaces.description: API used to query results, recommendations, or catalog slices from Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

interfaces.title: Search Experience Interface
interfaces.description: User-facing search or browse experience rendered by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

interfaces.title: Catalog Update Feed
interfaces.description: Event or ingestion feed used to refresh searchable content inside Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring to provide analytics capabilities required by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.
Depends on Remarketing, Refurbishment & Resale to provide experience capabilities required by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.
Depends on Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync to provide integration capabilities required by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Bike Catalog & Recommendation depends on upstream content or listing feeds to keep searchable inventory current.
Bike Catalog & Recommendation relies on external search or indexing infrastructure to serve discovery use cases.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: User-facing products depend on Bike Catalog & Recommendation to retrieve ranked results, recommendations, or navigable inventory.
Growth and merchandising tools depend on Bike Catalog & Recommendation to tune discovery outcomes and exposure.

children.name: Order Orchestration & Checkout
children.description: Runs the end-to-end ordering flow including approvals, signatures, reservations, order routing, and state transitions.

internalModules.title: Workflow and State Engine
internalModules.description: Orchestrates the main lifecycle, state transitions, and task flow handled by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

internalModules.title: Capacity and Exception Management
internalModules.description: Manages inventory, reservations, workload, and exception handling inside Order Orchestration & Checkout.

internalModules.title: Operations Console Logic
internalModules.description: Supports operator actions, escalations, and manual interventions required by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

interfaces.title: Workflow API
interfaces.description: API for starting, updating, or querying operational workflows managed by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

interfaces.title: Operator Console
interfaces.description: User interface for task handling, interventions, and operational control within Order Orchestration & Checkout.

interfaces.title: Lifecycle Status Events
interfaces.description: Event stream exposing state changes and exceptions produced by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Employer Policy & Program Management to provide policy capabilities required by Order Orchestration & Checkout.
Depends on Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience to provide identity capabilities required by Order Orchestration & Checkout.
Depends on Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync to provide integration capabilities required by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Order Orchestration & Checkout coordinates execution with external ERP, servicing, or operations platforms.
Order Orchestration & Checkout exchanges tasks, statuses, or escalations with customer and operations tooling.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Operational teams and services depend on Order Orchestration & Checkout to coordinate task flow, status, and exception handling.
Customer and partner-facing journeys depend on Order Orchestration & Checkout to advance fulfillment, servicing, or case progress.

children.name: Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience
children.description: Provides rider login, document wallet, order and claim visibility, support entry points, and self-service lifecycle actions.

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Contract Lifecycle Management to provide service capabilities required by Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.
Depends on Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync to provide integration capabilities required by Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.
Depends on Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring to provide analytics capabilities required by Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience integrates with an external identity provider for authentication and federation.
Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience may call external screening or verification services to enforce trust and compliance checks.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Internal and external applications depend on Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience for authentication, authorization, and trusted account state.
Governance and risk systems depend on Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience to emit trust, access, and compliance events.

children.name: Dealer & Service Partner Network Management
children.description: Onboards and governs dealer and service partners, manages coverage, credentials, SLAs, and partner performance.

internalModules.title: Onboarding and Performance Workflows

internalModules.title: Commercial and Compliance Controls

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Internal teams depend on Dealer & Service Partner Network Management to onboard, manage, and monitor partner relationships.

internalModules.description: Records the core financial or commercial transactions handled by Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Commercial flows depend on Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation to authorize, post, reconcile, or settle financial transactions.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Internal and external applications depend on Identity & Access Management for authentication, authorization, and trusted account state.

children.name: Enterprise Integration Layer
children.description: Offers connectors, canonical data models, and event-driven integration with HRIS, payroll, ERP, CRM, and finance systems.

internalModules.title: Contract and Mapping Layer
internalModules.description: Maintains schemas, field mappings, and versioned contracts used by Enterprise Integration Layer.

internalModules.title: Transformation and Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Transforms messages and routes requests or events through Enterprise Integration Layer.

internalModules.title: Access and Observability Controls
internalModules.description: Applies authentication, throttling, retry handling, and monitoring for Enterprise Integration Layer.

interfaces.title: Inbound API
interfaces.description: API entry point used to submit requests or payloads into Enterprise Integration Layer.

interfaces.title: Outbound Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event or webhook surface used by Enterprise Integration Layer to publish downstream updates.

interfaces.title: Partner Connector Surface
interfaces.description: Connector interface for external systems exchanging data through Enterprise Integration Layer.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience to provide identity capabilities required by Enterprise Integration Layer.

Depends on Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring to provide analytics capabilities required by Enterprise Integration Layer.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Enterprise Integration Layer exchanges operational data with external partner platforms and adjacent systems.
Enterprise Integration Layer depends on messaging infrastructure to route and buffer integration traffic.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Internal services depend on Enterprise Integration Layer to connect reliably with partner systems and adjacent platforms.
Partner-facing workflows depend on Enterprise Integration Layer to exchange data and synchronize state with external parties.

children.name: Workflow, Case & Exception Management
children.description: Supports multi-step back-office workflows, exception handling, SLA tracking, and coordinated resolution across teams.

internalModules.title: Workflow and State Engine
internalModules.description: Orchestrates the main lifecycle, state transitions, and task flow handled by Workflow, Case & Exception Management.

internalModules.title: Capacity and Exception Management
internalModules.description: Manages inventory, reservations, workload, and exception handling inside Workflow, Case & Exception Management.

internalModules.title: Operations Console Logic

interfaces.title: Operator Console
